name: MAN AHL DIVERSIFIED I LP
business: The Partnership engages in speculative trading of physical commodities, futures, options, swaps, and other derivatives through an investment in the Trading Company, which employs a systematic, statistically based investment strategy designed to capitalize on trends and inefficiencies across global markets. The Partnership offers Class A and Class B units to investors, including retail investors and retirement plans. The Partnership's trading advisor is AHL Partners LLP, an affiliate of the general partner.
namedSuppliers: The Bank of New York Mellon

exposures.sentence: The AHL Diversified Program employs a systematic, statistically based investment strategy that is designed to identify and capitalize on trends and other inefficiencies in markets around the world.

The Trading Advisor may utilize AI Tools in connection with managing the Partnership and certain vendors and counterparties of the Partnership, including third-party research providers, may use AI Tools.
The low margin deposits normally required in futures trading permit an extremely high degree of leverage.

The AHL Diversified Program trades globally in several market sectors, including without limitation, currencies, bonds, energies, stock indices, interest rates, credit, metals, agricultural and volatility.
